<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\Console\Messenger; /** * @author Kevin Bond <kevinbond@gmail.com> */ final class RunCommandContext { public function __construct( public readonly RunCommandMessage $message, public readonly int $exitCode, public readonly string $output, ) { } }
